ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wage_data" (
  "sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period of the data (e.g., Before, After) */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "empft" REAL /* Full-time employment rate */,
  "wage_st" REAL /* State minimum wage */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy change */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sheet_id", "time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., Before, After) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_periods_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_rates" (
  "empft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment rate entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for full-time workers */,
  "part_time_employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for part-time workers */,
  "total_employment_rate" REAL /* Total employment rate (full-time + part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("empft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minimum_wages" (
  "wage_st_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minimum wage entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "minimum_wage" REAL /* Minimum wage for the state */,
  "federal_minimum_wage" REAL /* Federal minimum wage for the time period */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the state minimum wage took effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_st_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minimum_wages_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minimum_wages_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policy analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sheet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the user */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sheet_id FOREIGN KEY ("sheet_id") REFERENCES wage_data ("sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was implemented */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
